message: Good morning team. All systems operational. Let's review today's priorities.
Dev Lead, I need you to build a mobile responsive layout for the dashboard. Hamburger menu, swipeable kanban columns, touch targets.
On it. Converting sidebar to slide-in drawer, adding responsive grids, 44px touch targets. ETA: 10 minutes.
Mobile responsive layout complete. Hamburger menu, drawer navigation, responsive grids all deployed.
Research Lead, compile an AI/ML intelligence brief. Scan for model releases, industry moves, dev tools from the past week.
Starting deep scan. Looking at GPT-5.4, Claude 4.6, DeepSeek V4 releases. Also tracking major funding rounds and OpenClaw news.

Brief complete. 15 items compiled: 5 model releases (GPT-5.4, Claude 4.6, DeepSeek V4, Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, OLMo Hybrid), 5 industry moves (LeCun's AMI $1B raise, Cursor $50B, Nvidia deals), 2 OpenClaw updates, 3 dev tools.
Build the Intelligence Brief dashboard widget. Dark theme, news cards with category badges, auto-refresh.
Component built and deployed to Overview page. Using /api/brief endpoint for data. Category filters, priority badges, source links included.
Moving Intelligence Brief to its own /news page. Adding daily cron at 8AM EAT for auto-updates.
Fix the Live Feed — it's dumping raw JSON. Only show meaningful messages, sort newest first.
Live Feed fixed. Skipping init events, filtering empty messages, sorting by timestamp descending.
